retry_reason: v4l2_ctrl_handler_free is unconditional and always decrements the refcount; retrying would cause a double-free if the refcount reaches zero.
contract_summary: Put wrapper that releases the reference on the device's V4L2 control handler (state->ctrl_hdl). After calling this function, the control handler must not be accessed. This function is typically called during driver cleanup (e.g., remove or error path) as part of releasing all acquired references. It does not return a value; the operation always executes.
